Student.headline: Party Permission
Student.description: I'm planning a small... study group. Might get a bit loud. Is that cool?

choices.text: Sure, just keep it down after 10pm

Student.headline: Bike Storage
Student.description: There's nowhere safe to keep my bike. Can we sort something out?

choices.text: Just keep it in your unit

Student.headline: Roommate Question
Student.description: A friend needs a place — can they move in and split my rent?

Professional.headline: Package Theft
Professional.description: My deliveries keep going missing from the lobby. It's becoming a real problem.

Professional.headline: Quiet for Calls
Professional.description: I work from home and the daytime noise is killing my video calls.

Artist.headline: Wall Modifications
Artist.description: I'd love to hang some large pieces — maybe even paint an accent wall. That okay?

choices.text: Please keep the walls as they are

Artist.headline: Noise Tolerance
Artist.description: I make music — nothing crazy, but there'll be sound. Are we good?

choices.text: Daytime's fine, just be mindful at night
I need you to keep it down

Family.headline: Safe Play Space
Family.description: The kids have nowhere safe to play. Could the courtyard be made kid-friendly?

choices.text: I'll fence and tidy the courtyard ($200)
There's really no space for that

Family.headline: Something Broke
Family.description: The kids' bathroom faucet gave out and it's chaos over here. Any chance of a quick fix?

choices.text: It's on the list, give me a week

Elderly.headline: Accessibility
Elderly.description: The stairs and the tub are getting hard for me. Could we add a few grab bars?

choices.text: Of course — I'll install grab bars ($150)
That's not in the budget right now

Elderly.headline: Heating Trouble
Elderly.description: My radiator's barely warm and these old bones feel every draft. Can you take a look?

choices.text: Bundle up for now, I'll get to it

default.headline: Minor Repair Request
default.description: My faucet is dripping and it's driving me crazy. Can you fix it?

choices.text: It's on the list, give me a week

conflict_mediation.headline: Neighbor Dispute
conflict_mediation.description: {initiator} says {target} has become impossible to live next to.

rent_negotiation.headline: Rent Is Getting Tight
rent_negotiation.description: With the rent where it is, I'm really feeling the squeeze. Any chance of some relief?
